prompt:
[Verse]
I called your name but it drowned in the air
A ghost of a whisper
You’re not really there
Shadows of moments we tried to hold tight
They’re slipping away into the night

[Prechorus]
Every heartbeat
A little less loud
Every memory
A little more cloud

[Chorus]
Now we’re echoes
Just echoes
Fading slow
Where do we go
Echoes
Just echoes
You and I
We’re letting go

[Verse 2]
The stars used to speak
Now they burn out in shame
The sky holds no answers
It’s never the same
I reach for your hand
But it’s just empty air
Love’s a cruel trick when it’s no longer there

[Prechorus]
Every moment
A little less real
Every wound
Too broken to heal

[Chorus]
Now we’re echoes
Just echoes
Fading slow
Where do we go
Echoes
Just echoes
You and I
We’re letting go
title: Just Echoes
tags: emotional, female vocals, edm, emotional edm ballad, soft, ballad, vocal, soft piano intro building to a cinematic future bass drop with sweeping pads and textured synths that convey deep longing, 110 bpm

prompt:
[Verse]
Empty rooms where laughter used to bloom
Now just dust and fading light
Photographs faces I can't quite place
Lost to the endless night

[Prechorus]
Remember promises whispers in the dark
Now just echoes of a broken heart

[Chorus]
Time a river ever flowing
Carries everything away
Love lost a ghost a memory fading
Is there nothing left to say?

[Verse 2]
Rain falls on the window pane again
Mirroring the tears I cry
Each drop a moment we can't reclaim
As the seasons drift on by

[Prechorus]
Remember promises whispers in the dark
Now just echoes of a broken heart

[Chorus]
Time a river ever flowing
Carries everything away
Love lost a ghost a memory fading
Is there nothing left to say?
title: Fading Memory
tags: emotional, raw, expressive solo, electric guitars, rock, ballad, vocal, rock ballad, male vocals, slow tempo, heavy drums, electric

prompt:
[Verse]
We laughed till the sun sank low
Chasing time where it dared not go
Your smile
A spark I didn't know
Could light this fire
Could start this glow

[Prechorus]
The lines blurred
Soft as the breeze
A shift in the air
So hard to see

[Chorus]
From friends to flames
A quiet burn
Hearts collide
No way to return
A step so small
A world so wide
We’re falling slow
Side by side

[Verse 2]
The stars watched as we lingered late
Words unspoken
A twist of fate
Your hand brushed mine
My heart took flight
A new horizon in fading light

[Chorus]
From friends to flames
A quiet burn
Hearts collide
No way to return
A step so small
A world so wide
We’re falling slow
Side by side

[Bridge]
No need to rush
No need to run
The moon will rise
The day’s not done
If this is love
Let’s let it be
Unfolding soft
Like poetry
title: From Friends to Flames
tags: heartfelt melody, 120 bpm, edm, light, soft, light plucks, gentle vocal, gentle, sunset tone, tone, soft edm, vocal, heartfelt
